---
title: "ESSER Analysis"
---

## Overview

A live-coded walkthrough of COVID recovery fund spending patterns using national F-33 data. We'll use the full dataset across multiple years to trace how federal dollars flowed to districts during the pandemic and how spending patterns shifted.

## Slides

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides.html" width="100%" height="475px"></iframe>
```

[View slides in full screen](slides.html){target="_blank"}
